title: anthyllis vulneraria subsp. rubra
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. rubra, also known as red kidney vetch, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the legume family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its high concentration of anthyllis vulneraria extract and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of red kidney vetch include wound healing, reduction of inflammation, and antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable remedy for skin conditions and infections. Red kidney vetch can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used externally to treat skin conditions or taken internally to promote overall health and well-being.
